steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank sits between the adjective 'American' and the proper name 'Will Barnet'. The blank must be filled with a noun identifying his role, and the punctuation must be correct for a proper name used as a direct identifier.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — artist:: A colon introduces a list, not a single identifying proper name. ✗
  • Choice B — artist: When a proper name directly identifies the role noun, no punctuation separates them. ✓
  • Choice C — artist--: An em dash signals emphasis or an inserted aside, which is unnecessary here. ✗
  • Choice D — artist,: A comma before the name makes it an appositive restating the noun, which is redundant and grammatically wrong in this construction. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
